title: Allow different conditional rules for automations
excerpt:
Similar to how in filters we have the capability to choose “And” or “Or” on statements, I think it would be great to be able to apply this logic on Automations. 
This would allow for us to reduce the amount of automation…

posts.author: jailynnhoops (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Similar to how in filters we have the capability to choose “And” or “Or” on statements, I think it would be great to be able to apply this logic on Automations.

This would allow for us to reduce the amount of automations needed to pinpoint specific scenarios.

It also becomes easier to teach other since it would start to standardizing the format.
